---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Resumer
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you currently can't?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Which Phase Does This Belong To?

- [ ] Phase 1 — Open Source Foundation
- [ ] Phase 2 — ATS Engine
- [ ] Phase 3 — AI Integration
- [ ] Phase 4 — UI Themes
- [ ] Phase 5 — Cover Letter
- [ ] Phase 6 — Export & Sharing
- [ ] Phase 7 — Developer Experience
- [ ] New category

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools that inspired this request.
